fiveStar.name: Angel's Hymn
fiveStar.skill:
Increase Attack by 30.0%/30.0%/39.0%/39.0%/48.0%/48.0%/57.0%.
For each Musical Note gained, grant 1 Angelic Chorus stack to all allies.
Angelic Chorus: Permanently increase damage by 0.7%/0.9%/0.9%/1.1%/1.1%/1.3%/1.3%. Stacks up to 12 times. At 12 stacks, increase critical damage by 15.3%/19.9%/19.9%/24.5%/24.5%/29.1%/29.1%.

fourStar.name: Divine Muse
fourStar.skill:
Increase Attack by 12.0%/12.0%/16.0%/16.0%/20.0%/20.0%/24.0%.
After using a skill, permanently increase Manaka's Attack by 11.0%/14.5%/14.5%/18.0%/18.0%/21.5%/21.5%. Stacks up to 2 times.
